subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of that spirit which hath ascended unto God! That which was written by Aqa Siyyid Taqi was through [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بقیه آن روح متصاعد الی الله آنچه باقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید بواسطه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
